title: lycopodioides gardneri
intro: Lycopodioides gardneri, also known as the Indian club moss, is a type of plant that belongs to the Lycopodiaceae family, a group of ancient, vascular plants. Traditionally, Lycopodioides gardneri has been used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In terms of herbal preparations, Lycopodioides gardneri is often used in the form of tinctures or infusions, and it can also be found in some traditional remedies, such as teas and salves.
